# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a modern React-based frontend application that serves as the user interface for a comprehensive HR management system. It follows a component-driven architecture using TypeScript for type safety.

### Tech Stack & Patterns
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with shadcn/ui component library
- **Routing**: React Router for client-side navigation
- **State Management**: React Query (TanStack Query) for server state management
- **Backend Integration**: Supabase client for database operations and authentication
- **Rich Text**: Tiptap editor for policy documents

### Application Structure
- **Entry Point**: `src/main.tsx` initializes the React app with routing
- **Root Component**: `src/pages/Index.tsx` serves as the main application router
- **Layout System**: `AppLayout.tsx` and `AppSidebar.tsx` provide consistent navigation
- **Component Organization**: Modular components in `src/components/` with UI primitives in `ui/`

## Key Files & Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap and React root rendering
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Main routing component and app entry point
- `src/App.tsx`: Central app component (if used)

### Layout & Navigation
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main application layout wrapper
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Sidebar navigation component
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation bar
- `src/components/NavLink.tsx`: Enhanced navigation link with active state styling
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Logo component with variant support

### Core Features
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx`: Employee selection dropdown with search
- `src/components/evaluations/EvaluationTimeline.tsx`: Timeline view of employee evaluations
- `src/components/hr-policies/RichTextEditor.tsx`: Rich text editor for HR policies

### Settings Components
- `src/components/settings/CompanyTab.tsx`: Company information management
- `src/components/settings/DepartmentsTab.tsx`: Department configuration
- `src/components/settings/RolesTab.tsx`: Role and permission management
- `src/components/settings/AttendanceTab.tsx`: Attendance settings
- `src/components/settings/EvaluationParametersTab.tsx`: Evaluation criteria setup
- `src/components/settings/ExpenseCategoriesTab.tsx`: Expense category management

### Utilities & Hooks
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management
- `src/hooks/use-toast.ts`: Toast notification system
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Utility functions (cn for className merging)
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based access control logic
- `src/lib/format-role.ts`: Role formatting utilities

## Data Flow & Business Logic

### Authentication & Authorization
- Uses Supabase Auth for user authentication
- Role-based access control with levels: employee, team_lead, hr_manager, ceo
- Access permissions defined in `src/lib/role-access.ts`

### Database Schema (via Supabase)
- **Employees**: User profiles with roles, departments, and personal info
- **Evaluations**: Quarterly performance reviews with scores and recommendations
- **Daily Evaluations**: Peer feedback system with directional reviews
- **HR Policies**: Rich text documents stored as HTML
- **Settings Tables**: Departments, roles, expense categories, etc.

### Evaluation System
- **Quarterly Evaluations**: Formal reviews with overall scores, comments, and recommendations
- **Daily Evaluations**: Informal peer feedback with directional context (positive/constructive)
- **Timeline View**: Unified display of all evaluations sorted by date
- **Visibility Rules**: Role-based filtering of evaluation visibility

### Component Patterns
- **UI Components**: shadcn/ui primitives for consistent design
- **Form Handling**: React Hook Form integration (implied by form components)
- **Data Fetching**: React Query for caching and synchronization
- **Error Handling**: Toast notifications for user feedback

## Configuration & Environment

### Build Configuration
- `vite.config.ts`: Vite build setup with React plugin
- `tsconfig.*.json`: TypeScript configuration for different environments
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Tailwind CSS customization
- `eslint.config.js`: Code linting rules

### Supabase Integration
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client initialization
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`: Generated TypeScript types for database schema
- Environment variables for Supabase URL and keys

### Testing Setup
- `vitest.config.ts`: Unit testing configuration
- `playwright.config.ts`: End-to-end testing setup
- Test files in `src/test/`

## Development Workflow

1. **Local Development**: `npm run dev` starts Vite dev server
2. **Database Changes**: Migrations in `supabase/migrations/` applied via Supabase CLI
3. **Type Generation**: Supabase types auto-generated from schema
4. **Testing**: `npm run test` for unit tests, Playwright for E2E
5. **Build**: `npm run build` creates optimized production bundle

## Key Architectural Decisions

- **Component Library**: shadcn/ui chosen for accessibility and customization
- **Database Choice**: Supabase for real-time capabilities and edge functions
- **State Management**: React Query for server state, local component state for UI
- **Routing**: Client-side routing with React Router for SPA experience
- **Type Safety**: Strict TypeScript usage throughout the codebase
- **Styling**: Utility-first CSS with Tailwind for maintainable styles
